stories.title: Jude Bellingham nets dagger as England win thrille...
England hold off France to win all-time WC thrille...
stories.summary: Bukayo Saka's hat trick helped England survive a dramatic second-half comeback to beat France 6-4 in Saturday's chaotic third-place playoff.

stories.title: Mbappé equals Messi's all-time WCup goal record
stories.summary: Kylian Mbappé has leapfrogged Lionel Messi on the all-time World Cup goal-scoring chart as he scored his 21st and 22nd career goals in the tournament.

stories.title: Burns holds Open lead; Fox, Kim two shots back
stories.summary: Two weeks after the birth of his daughter, Sam Burns finds himself atop the Open Championship leaderboard with a two-shot lead heading into Sunday's final round at Royal Birkdale.

stories.title: Brondello suspended 1 game for Reese comment
stories.summary: The WNBA suspended Tempo coach Sandy Brondello for one game after she was heard referring to Angel Reese as a "protected species."
